name: Cg's Sponge Cake Golden
recipeIngredient: Orange juice and pulp (from 1 large orange)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg yolks with 1/2 cup of sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Gradually add the remaining sugar to the yolk mixture, beating well.
3. Add the orange juice and pulp, as well as lemon extract. Mix for 7 minutes.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the egg whites until frothy.
5. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the batter with a spatula or whisk.
6. Sift together flour, salt, and baking powder.
7. Carefully fold the dry ingredients into the batter.
8. Place the batter in an ungreased spring form pan and bake at 325°F (slow oven) for 1 hour.
9. Invert the cake onto a wire rack to cool completely before removing the sides.
10. Sprinkle with powdered sugar or frost with powdered sugar frosting before serving.
Enjoy your baking!
